name: Darwin-LEADERS 对照样本池
selection_rule: 优先选择上市公司、年报/公告/招股书可核验、经营数据连续、已有研究底稿或公开披露稳定的企业；排除证据等级C且财务与治理信息过少的企业。

companies.name: 宁德时代
companies.reason: A股上市龙头，财务、治理、研发、产能和客户结构信息连续，适合校准成熟制造龙头。
companies.reason_en: An A-share listed battery leader with continuous financial, governance, R&D, capacity, and customer-structure disclosures, suitable for calibrating mature manufacturing leaders.

companies.name: 科大讯飞
companies.reason: A股上市AI应用公司，收入、利润、现金流、研发投入和行业业务披露较完整。
companies.reason_en: An A-share listed AI application company with relatively complete disclosure of revenue, profit, cash flow, R&D investment, and industry operations.

companies.name: 寒武纪
companies.reason: A股上市AI芯片公司，盈利拐点、现金流、研发和客户风险可从公告持续追踪。
companies.reason_en: An A-share listed AI chip company whose profitability inflection, cash flow, R&D, and customer risks can be tracked through continuing disclosures.

companies.name: 商汤科技
companies.reason: 港股上市AI公司，亏损收窄、现金流、业务重组和AI商业化数据可持续跟踪。
companies.reason_en: A Hong Kong-listed AI company with trackable data on narrowing losses, cash flow, business restructuring, and AI commercialization.

companies.name: 比亚迪
companies.reason: A/H上市，财务披露充分；适合检验规模、热度与利润质量之间的偏差。
companies.reason_en: Listed in both mainland China and Hong Kong with extensive financial disclosure; useful for testing divergence among scale, attention, and earnings quality.

companies.name: 华为
companies.reason: 非上市但年报披露稳定，适合校准非上市企业治理透明度和财务硬度折扣。
companies.reason_en: Privately held but consistent in annual-report disclosure, making it useful for calibrating governance-transparency and financial-hardness discounts for private companies.

companies.name: 小鹏汽车
companies.reason: 美股/港股上市，销量、毛利、现金、研发和智能化投入可持续追踪。
companies.reason_en: Listed in the US and Hong Kong, with continuously trackable deliveries, gross margin, cash, R&D, and intelligent-vehicle investment.

companies.name: 理想汽车
companies.reason: 美股/港股上市，盈利质量、现金储备、产品节奏和组织效率数据较完整。
companies.reason_en: Listed in the US and Hong Kong, with relatively complete data on earnings quality, cash reserves, product cadence, and organizational efficiency.

companies.name: 蔚来汽车
companies.reason: 美股/港股上市，亏损、现金消耗、产品矩阵和组织效率适合做反向校准。
companies.reason_en: Listed in the US and Hong Kong; its losses, cash burn, product portfolio, and organizational efficiency make it useful for downside calibration.

companies.name: 地平线
companies.reason: 港股上市后披露增强，芯片出货、解决方案收入和亏损收窄可跟踪。
companies.reason_en: Disclosure improved after its Hong Kong listing, allowing continued tracking of chip shipments, solution revenue, and narrowing losses.

companies.name: 摩尔线程
companies.reason: 上市后信息质量提升，适合校准国产GPU公司从叙事到财务兑现的偏差。
companies.reason_en: Post-listing information quality has improved, making it suitable for calibrating the gap between narrative and financial delivery among Chinese GPU companies.

companies.name: 沐曦股份
companies.reason: 科创板上市后披露完整度提升，适合与摩尔线程做同业对照。
companies.reason_en: Disclosure became more complete after its STAR Market listing, making it a useful peer comparison with Moore Threads.

companies.name: 宇树科技
companies.reason: IPO材料带来较高信息增量，适合校准高增长机器人公司的订单、利润和治理信号。
companies.reason_en: IPO materials provide substantial new information, useful for calibrating orders, profitability, and governance signals at a high-growth robotics company.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.reason: 披露不如上市公司，但融资、结构、合作和收入线索密集，适合校准高热度非上市AI企业。
companies.reason_en: Disclosure is weaker than at listed companies, but dense financing, structure, partnership, and revenue signals make it suitable for calibrating a high-profile private AI company.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.reason: 融资、客户、产品和算力合作信息较多，适合与OpenAI对照治理与财务硬度偏差。
companies.reason_en: Its financing, customer, product, and compute-partnership disclosures support comparison with OpenAI on governance and financial-hardness divergence.

excluded_examples.name: DeepSeek
excluded_examples.reason: 技术影响力强，但财务、治理、收入和组织信息披露不足，暂不进入信息质量最高样本池。

excluded_examples.name: 字节跳动
excluded_examples.reason: 公司质量重要，但当前本地数据缺少来源和复盘底稿，待补齐后再进入样本池。

excluded_examples.name: 吉利汽车
excluded_examples.reason: 上市披露质量较好，但本期样本优先保留小鹏、理想、蔚来作为新能源车同组校准。
